# Geti UI (`@geti/ui`)

Geti UI is a React + TypeScript component design system for Intel Geti products.

## Package

- npm package: `@geti/ui`
- styles entrypoint: `@geti/ui/styles.css`
- icons entrypoint: `@geti/ui/icons`
- assets entrypoints:
  - `@geti/ui/assets`
  - `@geti/ui/assets/images`
  - `@geti/ui/assets/domains`
  - `@geti/ui/assets/primary-tools`

## Usage basics

```tsx
import '@geti/ui/styles.css';
import { ThemeProvider, Button } from '@geti/ui';

export function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider>
      <Button variant="accent">Click me</Button>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

## Docs

- Local docs source: `documentation/docs/`
- Start local docs + ui watch: `pnpm docs:dev:with-ui`
- Public docs (repo): https://github.com/open-edge-platform/geti-ui

## Component categories

- UI primitives
- Form controls (including color/date controls)
- Data display
- Feedback
- Navigation
- Overlays
- Layouts
- Assets and icons

## Development commands

- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm test`
- `pnpm type-check`
- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm docs:build`

## References

- React Spectrum docs: https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/react-spectrum/
- React Aria docs: https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/react-aria/
- Adobe llms.txt reference: https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/llms.txt
